---
title: "Research"
page-layout: article
---

```{=html}
<p class="page-subtitle">Publications, preprints, and ongoing work.</p>

<div class="sk-empty-state">
  <div class="empty-icon">📄</div>
  <h3>Publications coming soon.</h3>
  <p>Papers and preprints will appear here as they are published.</p>
</div>
```
